channel.title: Blog on tired, since 1985
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on tired, since 1985

item.description:
Back to GitHub Pages! I just discovered Hugo the other day (bye bye Ruby rbenv Jekyll nonsense 😵‍💫)!

Micro.blog is a great service with a friendly community and helpful support staff (think if Twitter was ultra nice). For me it seemed too hard to ignore the heavier social media side to it vs the blogging element.

Basically, I just want to post into a void and have no clue who might be reading, subscribing or clicking through.

Now… to figure out a nice way to generate posts via mobile… 🤔
